description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Mews Booking Engine API (historically the Distributor API, served from /api/distributor/v1) lets developers build guest-facing booking engines that create reservations directly in Mews. It exposes enterprise configuration, availability, pricing, products, vouchers, payment cards, and reservation group creation for front-end client consumption.
